to

  -  Figma  Link  -  Doc  SOP  (if  any)  
 
📝
 
Description
  
✅  Retrieve  Open  Tickets  from  Zendesk  
●  The  Zendesk  API  is  used  to  fetch  a  list  of  open  tickets.  
 

[page 2]
●  Local  workflow  name:  get_zendesk_tickets  
 
 
🔁  Loop  Through  Tickets  
●  A  loop  is  used  to  iterate  through  all  retrieved  open  tickets.  
 
 
📄  Check  for  Duplicates  in  Google  Sheets  
●  The  workflow  reads  data  from  a  Google  Sheet  to  check  for  duplicate  tickets.  
 
 
🚫  Filter  Tickets  Based  on  Company  
●  If  a  ticket  is  not  a  duplicate ,  the  workflow  checks  the  company  name.  
 ●  If  the  company  name  is  Modern  Health ,  the  ticket  is  skipped  and  added  to  an  exception  
list
.
 
 
 
📂  Retrieve  Profile  Information  from  Django  
●  For  valid  tickets,  the  workflow  queries  Django  to  retrieve  the  following  information:  
 
json  CopyEdit  {    "uuid":  "string?",    "djang

etrieve  Profile  Information  from  Django  
●  For  valid  tickets,  the  workflow  queries  Django  to  retrieve  the  following  information:  
 
json  CopyEdit  {    "uuid":  "string?",    "djangoId":  "string?",    "companyName":  "string?",    "userFoundFlag":  "boolean"  }    

[page 3]
❌  Handle  Missing  Profiles  
●  If  a  matching  profile  is  not  found  in  Django,  the  ticket  is  moved  to  the  exception  sheet .  
 
 
📊  Retrieve  Additional  Data  from  Looker  
●  The  workflow  then  queries  Looker  to  retrieve  additional  relevant  information.  
 
 
🔄  Update  Django  and  Notify  Zendesk  
●  Based  on  the  data  from  Looker:  
 ○  Update  records  in  Django  
 ○  Send  a  message  or  update  back  to  Zendesk
